queries.question: What prepared meals have a best before date of 10.11.2018 and what takeaway products have the same best before date?
queries.sql:
SELECT Products.name 
FROM FoodTypes JOIN Products ON FoodTypes.FoodTypeID = Products.Dining
WHERE (FoodTypes.TypeName = "Prepared Meal" OR FoodTypes.TypeName = "Takeaway") AND Products.Best_Before = "10.11.2018"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?foodtypes a :FoodTypes .
  ?products a :Products .
  ?products p:hasFoodTypes ?foodtypes .
  ?products p:name ?name .
  ?foodtypes p:TypeName ?typename_w .
  ?foodtypes p:TypeName ?typename_w2 .
  ?products p:Best_Before ?best_before_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?typename_w) = "Prepared Meal" || STR(?typename_w2) = "Takeaway")) && STR(?best_before_w) = "10.11.2018"))
}

queries.question: List all prepared meals and also list takeaway products with a best before date of 10.11.2018.
queries.sql:
SELECT Products.name 
FROM FoodTypes JOIN Products ON FoodTypes.FoodTypeID = Products.Dining
WHERE FoodTypes.TypeName = "Prepared Meal" OR FoodTypes.TypeName = "Takeaway" AND Products.Best_Before = "10.11.2018"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?foodtypes a :FoodTypes .
  ?products a :Products .
  ?products p:hasFoodTypes ?foodtypes .
  ?products p:name ?name .
  ?foodtypes p:TypeName ?typename_w .
  ?foodtypes p:TypeName ?typename_w2 .
  ?products p:Best_Before ?best_before_w .
  FILTER((STR(?typename_w) = "Prepared Meal" || (STR(?typename_w2) = "Takeaway" && STR(?best_before_w) = "10.11.2018")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me prepared meals and takeaway products with a best before date of 10.11.2018.
